summary: Testing Hemali Payment enhancements (Iteration 98): Print Receipt PDF, Daily Report Hemali section, Monthly Summary month filter. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working - print buttons, monthly summary with month filter dropdown, daily report Hemali section with PAID/UNPAID badges.
critical_code_review_comments: Print Receipt PDF uses NAVKAR AGRO header with orange branding, Hindi+English labels, items table, calculation section, signature lines
Daily Report API includes hemali_payments section with count, paid_count, unpaid_count, total_work, total_paid, details
Daily Report PDF/Excel properly includes Hemali section after Staff Attendance using make_table helper
Monthly Summary correctly filters by month parameter using date regex query
Month filter dropdown in frontend shows last 12 months options
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: Ramesh (4 payments on 2026-03-15), Suresh (1 payment on 2026-02-15)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Print receipt PDF endpoint fully functional. Daily report includes Hemali section with summary cards and detail table showing PAID/UNPAID badges. Monthly Summary has month filter dropdown working correctly with last 12 months options.

print_receipt_pdf.details: Returns valid PDF with NAVKAR AGRO header, Hindi+English labels, signature lines

daily_report_hemali_section.details: hemali_payments section includes count, paid_count, unpaid_count, total_work, total_paid, details array

daily_report_pdf.details: PDF includes Hemali section, valid PDF format verified

daily_report_excel.details: Excel includes Hemali section, valid XLSX format verified

monthly_summary_unfiltered.details: Returns all sardars with all months data

monthly_summary_with_month_filter.details: Correctly filters to show only 2026-03 data

monthly_summary_empty_result.details: Returns empty result for future month

hemali_detail_fields.details: Details contain sardar, items, total, advance_deducted, amount_paid, new_advance, status fields

hemali_total_calculations.details: total_work and total_paid match sum of paid payments

frontend_monthly_summary_tab.details: Monthly Summary sub-tab accessible with data-testid='hemali-tab-monthly'

frontend_month_filter_dropdown.details: Month filter dropdown (data-testid='monthly-filter-month') shows 13 month options

frontend_print_button.details: Print button (data-testid='hemali-print-0') visible for each payment row

frontend_daily_report_hemali_section.details: Daily Report shows 'Hemali Payments / हेमाली' section with summary cards and detail table

frontend_paid_unpaid_badges.details: PAID/UNPAID badges displayed correctly in both Hemali Payments list and Daily Report
